/usr/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -static -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/user/user.ld CMakeFiles/workbench.sys.dir/workbench/src/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/workbench.sys.dir/workbench/src/desktop.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/workbench.sys.dir/workbench/src/filebrowser.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/workbench.sys.dir/workbench/src/icons.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/workbench.sys.dir/workbench/src/theme.cpp.obj -o ../workbench.sys  ../lib/libvipergui.a ../lib/libviperlibc.a
